creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:
This supercedes http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=163737

It's has API changes in this version,
all its families would also need update.

im engines:
textproc/ibus-kmfl   [B]
textproc/ibus-m17n   [F]
textproc/ibus-table  [N]
chinese/ibus-chewing [F]
chinese/ibus-pinyin  [N]*
japanese/ibus-anthy  [N]
japanese/ibus-mozc   [U]
japanese/ibus-skk    [U]
korean/ibus-hangul   [N]

im clients:
textproc/ibus-qt     [N]*
textproc/ibus-el     [U]

[B]: broken
[F]: latest version is fine
[N]: latest version sould be find, not tested yet
[U]: unknown
* same maintainer as ibus

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
